particulars.description: 3 summerhill blaydon on tyne gateshead t/n TY75836 assigns the goodwill of all businesses, from time to time carried on at the property, with the benefit of all authorisations, permits, registration certificates or licences of any kind, also by way of fixed charge the equipment & goods (if any) & all other fixtures, fittings, plant & machinery & by way of floating charge on other moveable plant, machinery, furniture, equipment, goods & other effects which are from time to time on the property see image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee (trading as yorkshire bank) on any account whatsoever under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge
